temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) At night, on a wet, reflective pier, three men stand beside a dark green Rolls-Royce. The city skyline is visible in the background, with bright lights reflecting on the water. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a man in a brown coat and glasses, who smiles faintly as he looks forward. (Storyline: The scene introduces a group of men on a pier at night, establishing a mysterious and slightly tense atmosphere. The focus on one man's smile suggests he is a key figure.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to play, building suspense.)
(00:04-00:07) A man in a dark coat approaches the man in the brown coat, who is now revealed to be a police officer. The man in the dark coat greets him, and the officer shakes his hand, maintaining a serious expression. (Storyline: A formal introduction occurs between a superior officer and his subordinate, confirming the police presence and the official nature of their meeting.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Respectful, neutral. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful music continues.)
